portability_claim: measurement framework travels better than effect size
main_caution: implementation and informality are not fully measured

setting: border regions exposed to cross-border labor access
comparison_class: regions and firms with different exposure
portability_claim: mechanism of labor-market integration can travel
main_caution: effect size depends on geography, skills, and bargaining

setting: local enforcement expansion in a high-informality economy
identifying_variation: rollout or intensity of inspection capacity
main_caution: local fiscal capacity and private benefits of formality differ

setting: linked worker data across welfare-state regimes
identifying_variation: policy and regime differences in harmonized records
observed_margin: earnings, unemployment duration, mobility, benefit receipt
portability_claim: comparative margins can be harmonized if definitions are transparent
main_caution: institutions are bundled and measurement may differ

setting: supplier factories in a global production network
identifying_variation: audit timing, buyer pressure, or management-practice exposure
observed_margin: labor standards compliance and working conditions
main_caution: audit quality and worker voice may differ across chains

setting: historical institutional classification of bargaining systems
identifying_variation: inherited bargaining institutions and sectoral exposure
main_caution: historical categories can hide current implementation differences
